name: Typeform
tagline: Beautiful forms and surveys people love to fill in
description: Typeform creates engaging, conversational forms and surveys with a one-question-at-a-time format. Widely used for lead generation, customer research, quizzes, and NPS surveys — with significantly higher completion rates than traditional forms.
pros: Beautiful design out of the box
cons: Response limits on all paid plans
use_cases: You need a lead gen form or quiz embedded on a landing page where completion rate matters and a standard HTML form would kill conversions
Your customer research depends on NPS surveys and in-depth feedback forms where respondent experience directly affects response quality
You want to build a conditional logic form — showing questions based on previous answers — without writing code
Your brand requires polished, on-brand forms that match your website design, not generic form-builder aesthetics
